items.name: markdown
items.title: Markdown
items.description: Renders sanitized content HTML (e.g. body_html from the Medusa content plugin) in a shadcn-themed prose container with Shiki code styling.

items.name: image-zoom
items.title: Image Zoom
items.description: Click-to-zoom full-screen image overlay with gallery navigation. Vendored from more-shadcn-svelte (MIT, © 2025 kevwpl).

items.name: gallery
items.title: Gallery
items.description: Compound product image gallery/lightbox primitives (Root, Carousel, Image, Thumbnails, ThumbnailImage, Dots) on embla, sharing a context. Compose them directly or use the gallery1/gallery2 presets.

items.name: gallery1
items.title: Gallery 1
items.description: Batteries-included product gallery preset: embla carousel + thumbnails (left/right/bottom/none) + mobile peek & dots. Accepts image URLs or Medusa image objects.

items.name: gallery2
items.title: Gallery 2
items.description: Gallery 1 preset plus click-to-zoom overlay.

items.name: search
items.title: Search
items.description: Compound storefront search primitives (Root, Icon, Input, Results, Hit) sharing a context. Root defaults its search fn to the sveltekit-medusa-sdk `search` remote; Results renders products first (headerless) then non-product types under headings, as a dropdown or an in-flow full-page list.

items.name: search-box
items.title: Search Box
items.description: Drop-in navbar search box: full input + live-results dropdown above a configurable breakpoint, collapsing to an icon that links to a search page below it. Assembles the search primitives.

items.name: search-dialog
items.title: Search Dialog
items.description: Command-palette search: Ctrl/Cmd+K opens a centered modal (page behind blurred) with the input autofocused and arrow-key-navigable results. Composes the search primitives inside a shadcn Dialog; drop into your layout.

items.name: faq
items.title: FAQ
items.description: Compound FAQ primitives (Root, Item, Question, Answer) over the shadcn Accordion. Defaults to the stock look; each part is stylable via class. Question exposes a swappable icon snippet + configurable rotate-on-open; Answer renders children (supports {@html}). Loop your own Q&A data over the items.

items.name: product
items.title: Product
items.description: Compound Product primitives (Root, Title, Subtitle, Description, Price, Options, OptionButton) over a Medusa StoreProduct. URL-driven variant selection (?v= links), inventory-aware option availability (manage_inventory/inventory_quantity), currency-aware price with sale strikethrough, sanitized {@html} description. Pure resolution logic in product-logic.ts; no $effect (SSR-safe). Fetch the product reactively in your route and pass it in.

items.name: theme-button
items.title: Theme Button
items.description: Icon button that toggles light/dark via mode-watcher. Resizable, with overridable sun/moon icons.

items.name: theme-toggle
items.title: Theme Toggle
items.description: Toggle that reflects and flips the light/dark theme via mode-watcher. Overridable icons + label.

items.name: theme-switch
items.title: Theme Switch
items.description: Bare switch that toggles light/dark via mode-watcher. Optional additive form binding for settings forms.

items.name: theme-select
items.title: Theme Select
items.description: Bare light/dark/system dropdown driving mode-watcher's userPrefersMode. Optional additive form binding.

items.name: google-places-autocomplete
items.title: Google Places Autocomplete
items.description: Address autocomplete field wrapping Google's PlaceAutocompleteElement, themed with shadcn tokens (chrome stripped, dropdown restyled). Emits a normalized address on select; no store writes.

items.name: input-text
items.title: Input Text
items.description: Text/email/tel/number/password/textarea field bound to a SvelteKit remote-form field proxy, wrapped in shadcn Field with label + validation errors.

items.name: input-select
items.title: Input Select
items.description: Native select bound to a SvelteKit remote-form field proxy with data-driven options, wrapped in shadcn Field with label + validation errors.

items.name: input-select-country
items.title: Input Select Country
items.description: Country select bound to a remote-form field, options fed from the store's regions (validated ISO-2 code values). Extends input-select.

items.name: input-select-state
items.title: Input Select State
items.description: US state select (ISO 3166-2 values) bound to a remote-form field. Extends input-select.

items.name: input-postal-code
items.title: Input Postal Code
items.description: Postal-code text field that uppercases as you type (alphanumeric postcodes) and bubbles the change. Extends input-text.
